latin: Ego sum deus aureus! Dennisus in culmine tecti stabat et in caelum clamabat. se perfectum esse credebat. ego sum deus aureus! quinque stellarum vir!

questions.target: A golden god and a five-star man
choices: A golden god and a five-star man

translation: I am a golden god! Dennis was standing on top of a roof and shouting at the sky. He believed himself to be perfect. I am a golden god! A five-star man!
